Lawn Game Rentals in Nova Scotia

Nova Kingdom Rentals offers lawn game rentals from Bridgewater for events across the South Shore and Nova Scotia by availability and travel quote. All 12 games available: Cornhole, Giant Connect 4, Giant Jenga, Ladder Toss, Ring Toss, Badminton, Tug of War, Bocce Ball, Spikeball, Giant Tic Tac Toe, Croquet, and Birch Wood Washer Toss.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is Bridgewater-based and can quote lawn games across Nova Scotia by availability, event location, travel distance, and setup needs. Lawn games can be quoted separately or added to inflatable and package rentals.

Featured Rentals

  • Crown Axe Challenge - Interactive Game, $180, Dry-use - Inflatable axe throwing for friendly competition.
  • Crown Kick Darts - Interactive Game, $160, Dry-use - Giant inflatable football darts game for all ages.
  • Crown Island Combo - Combo Inflatable, By quote, Wet-use - Tropical combo with bounce, slide, and splash/pool fun.

Best For

  • All-ages events
  • Schools
  • Outdoor parties
  • Community gatherings

Frequently Asked Questions

Can lawn games be booked without an inflatable?
Yes, lawn games can be requested separately or added to inflatable/package rentals depending on availability and event location.
Can lawn games be rented without an inflatable?
Yes. Lawn games can be booked standalone or added to any inflatable or package rental. Select 5 games for $175, 10 for $250, or all 12 including Cornhole for $280.
Are bookings confirmed after submitting an online request?
No. Submitting a request does not confirm your booking. Nova Kingdom Rentals confirms availability, travel cost, setup suitability, and deposit details before any booking is finalized.
How far in advance should I book?
We recommend booking as early as possible, especially for summer weekends. Availability is confirmed manually — book early to secure your date.
